title: Pilosella spathophyllopsis
taxonomy: Pilosella spathophyllopsis is a rare species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Pilosella, which is a group of plants previously known as Hieracium subgenus Pilosella. This classification places Pilosella spathophyllopsis within the larger family of composite flowers. Further classification can be broken down into the family Asteraceae, tribe Cichorieae, and the subfamily Cichorioideae. As a member of the Pilosella genus, Pilosella spathophyllopsis shares characteristics with other dandelion-like plants in this family.
